summary: Iteration 88 - Testing Cuisine/Kitchen Tracker feature. All 21 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: KitchenTrackerModal opens for admin/manager with correct title, all 5 manager preset buttons work, messages sent successfully. CuisinePage shows Messages tab with all 6 cuisinier reply buttons, Démarrer button for items.
critical_code_review_comments: All Cuisine/Kitchen Tracker backend endpoints working correctly:
- GET /api/cuisine/messages/presets returns 5 manager presets and 6 cuisinier presets ✓
- POST /api/cuisine/messages creates messages with proper validation (code must match role) ✓
- GET /api/cuisine/messages returns messages for actor role with unread count ✓
- POST /api/cuisine/messages/{id}/read marks message as read ✓
- POST /api/cuisine/messages/read-all marks all messages read for role ✓
- GET /api/cuisine/orders works for manager and cuisinier (403 for server) ✓
- PATCH /api/cuisine/orders/{table_id}/items/{idx}/start - cuisinier only (403 for manager) ✓
- PATCH /api/cuisine/orders/{table_id}/items/{idx}/served - manager only, requires ready_at (400 if not ready, 403 for cuisinier) ✓
- MongoDB _id not exposed in cuisine_messages responses ✓
- Complete workflow received → in_progress → ready → served works correctly ✓
Frontend KitchenTrackerModal working correctly:
- data-testid='open-kitchen-tracker-btn' visible for admin and manager roles ✓
- Modal title 'Suivi Cuisine — Temps réel' displayed ✓
- All 5 manager preset buttons present (kt-send-TIME, kt-send-URGENT, kt-send-CONFIRM, kt-send-REDO, kt-send-CANCEL) ✓
- Clicking preset button sends message and shows toast 'Message envoyé au cuisinier' ✓
- Kitchen orders displayed with status badges (Reçu, En cours) ✓
- 'Réponses du cuisinier' section shows received messages ✓
Frontend CuisinePage working correctly:
- Messages tab (data-testid='cuisine-tab-messages') present with unread badge ✓
- All 6 cuisinier reply buttons present (cuisine-reply-OK, cuisine-reply-5MIN, cuisine-reply-10MIN, cuisine-reply-15MIN, cuisine-reply-OUT, cuisine-reply-SOON) ✓
- Clicking reply button sends message and shows toast 'Réponse envoyée' ✓
- Commandes tab shows orders with 'Démarrer' button (data-testid='cuisine-item-start-{id}-{idx}') ✓
- 'Tout marquer prêt' button available for each order ✓
seed_data_creation: Test tables created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 confirmed Cuisine/Kitchen Tracker feature is fully functional. Key behaviors tested: (1) GET /api/cuisine/messages/presets returns 5 manager presets (TIME, URGENT, CONFIRM, REDO, CANCEL) and 6 cuisinier presets (OK, 5MIN, 10MIN, 15MIN, OUT, SOON), (2) POST /api/cuisine/messages validates code against role (cuisinier cannot use manager codes), (3) Item status workflow: received → in_progress (started_at) → ready (ready_at) → served (served_at), (4) Only cuisinier can start items, only manager can mark served, (5) Served requires ready_at to be set first (400 error otherwise), (6) Frontend KitchenTrackerModal opens from ChefHat button in header for admin/manager, (7) CuisinePage Messages tab shows received messages and reply buttons for cuisinier.
features_tested: GET /api/cuisine/messages/presets - returns manager_to_cuisinier (5) and cuisinier_to_manager (6) presets
GET /api/cuisine/messages - returns messages for actor role with unread count
GET /api/cuisine/orders - manager and cuisinier can see orders
Permission: cuisinier cannot use manager codes (400)
Security: MongoDB _id not exposed in responses
Frontend: 5 manager preset buttons in modal
Frontend: CuisinePage Messages tab with 6 reply buttons
Frontend: Démarrer button for items in CuisinePage
